name: compressor-vscode
description: Save tokens in GitHub Copilot agent mode — compressed read/search/outline tools, a savings ticker & report, and instruction-pack management. No network calls.
author: Andrey Vasilevsky <anvanster@gmail.com>

compressor.savingsWindow.description: Lookback window for the savings ticker and report.

compressor.mode.description: Compression mode for the compressor_read tool. 'full' disables compression (passthrough); 'optimized' strips comments and dedupes repeated lines; 'slim' additionally filters logs. Omitted content is always marked with a recoverable [compressor:] marker; token figures derived from it are estimates.

languageModelTools.name: compressor_read
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read a workspace file with automatic token compression. Preserves line numbers; collapses comments and repeated lines; marks any omitted span inline as [compressor: … offset=N limit=M to retrieve]. Prefer this over the built-in file read for files longer than ~200 lines and for logs or build output. Read the whole file first and let it collapse the noise. To read an exact range uncompressed, pass offset (1-based start line) and limit (line count). If a [compressor: …] marker hides a span you need, call again with the offset/limit it states — nothing is lost, only deferred. Short files are returned unchanged, so there is no downside to preferring it.

offset.description: 1-based start line for an exact uncompressed range

limit.description: line count for the exact range

languageModelTools.name: compressor_search
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the open workspace for a string or regular expression and get grep-style results (file path + line number + matching line) with token compression: repeated lines are deduplicated and oversized result sets are truncated with a recoverable [compressor:] marker. Prefer this over reading whole files when you are looking for where something is defined or used. Inputs: query (required); isRegex (treat query as a JS regex); ignoreCase; include (a glob like 'src/**/*.ts'); maxResults. Results are confined to the open workspace folders.

query.description: text or regular expression to search for

isRegex.description: treat query as a JS regular expression

include.description: glob of files to search, relative to the workspace (e.g. src/**/*.ts)

maxResults.description: maximum number of matches to return

languageModelTools.name: compressor_outline
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return a code file's structure — top-level imports and signatures (functions, classes, types) — with the bodies collapsed into recoverable [compressor: … offset/limit] markers and line numbers preserved. Use this to understand the shape of a large source file cheaply before reading specific parts; then use compressor_read with the offset/limit a marker states to expand a body you need. Supports TypeScript/JavaScript, Rust, Python, and Go; other file types return a note telling you to use compressor_read. Input: path (workspace-relative or absolute). Confined to the open workspace folders.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Compressor
walkthroughs.description: Compress large file reads in Copilot agent mode, steer the agent toward the tool, and watch your token savings.

steps.title: What Compressor does
steps.description: Fewer tokens, same work — Compressor shrinks the agent's reads, searches, and outlines before they reach the model. No network calls; chars exact, tokens estimated.

steps.title: Enable Copilot steering
steps.description:
Nudge Copilot agent mode toward compressor's tools — read, search, and outline.
[Enable Steering](command:compressor.enableSteering)

steps.title: Read with #compressorRead
steps.description: In an agent-mode chat, ask the model to read a large file with #compressorRead — see the example prompts to the right.

steps.title: Read, search & outline
steps.description: Compressor's three tools: #compressorRead, #compressorSearch (find where code is used), and #compressorOutline (a file's shape) — see the example prompts to the right.

steps.title: See your savings
steps.description:
Open the savings report to see how much you've saved.
[Show Savings](command:compressor.showSavings)

steps.title: Tune and inspect
steps.description:
Switch compression mode, count tokens, or preview compression.
[Select Read Compression Mode](command:compressor.selectMode)
